cases.headline: Local acknowledgement stays visible until authoritative settlement lands.
cases.operatorPosture: keep one chain; do not treat local acknowledgement as calm success

cases.headline: Accepted-for-processing remains pending and same-shell.
cases.operatorPosture: hold the anchor and wait for external confirmation

cases.headline: Projection-visible truth still cannot quiet the shell.
cases.operatorPosture: show projection visibility but preserve pending posture

cases.headline: Review-required outcomes keep continuity while the user re-checks.
cases.operatorPosture: block unsafe follow-up actions until review clears

cases.headline: Tuple drift degrades to recovery instead of silently settling the stale chain.
cases.operatorPosture: open a new action chain; keep the old one recoverable

cases.headline: Policy and scope blocks must preserve the last safe anchor and summary tier.
cases.operatorPosture: recover in place with the governing limitation explained

cases.headline: Later evidence supersedes pending state without creating a second success chain.
